creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Let’s make an easy and delicious Valentine’s dessert with @rainbowmilk . 🥰

This No Bake Cheesecake Parfait is perfect for Valentine’s picnic or party! 
❤️ Make Graham Cracker Crumbs by combining crushed grahams and butter. Set aside.
❤️ Make Cheesecake filling by mixing 2 blocks of cream cheese, 2 tablespoons of sour cream, Rainbow Sweetened Condensed Milk. Whip until smooth and chill.
❤️ Slice fresh strawberries 
❤️ Layer in a glass and enjoy with your Valentine! 

What dessert will you make with Rainbow Sweetened Condensed Milk?
